nodes.label: complete
nodes.rationale: Delegates LLM complete call passing response schema and max output tokens limit

nodes.label: ScenarioGenerationGraph State
nodes.rationale: State tracks pre_input, request_id, case_state, expansion_result, and final_scenario.

nodes.label: generate_case Node
nodes.rationale: Uses case_state cache and ScenarioGenerator.generate_case to generate the case.

nodes.label: generate_expansion Node
nodes.rationale: Performs skeleton + expansion using a critic/refinement loop.

nodes.label: generate_content Node
nodes.rationale: Generates map, suspects, clues with a clearability retry loop.

nodes.label: JWT-based Conversation History Encryption
nodes.rationale: Protects dialogue privacy from interception/tampering and avoids database roundtrips by delegating conversation state representation to the client via JWT claims.

nodes.label: Asset and Tag Administration
nodes.rationale: Allows dynamic mapping of tags to scenarios and assets, using reactive stack (Spring WebFlux + R2DBC + Coroutines) for asynchronous non-blocking data operations and Thymeleaf for standard web interface.
